description: Ajouter une section 'Rappels de paiement' dans le step interventions du bail. Une card unique avec jour configurable (1-28). Si cochée, crée un rappel mensuel pour chaque mois restant du bail (skip dates passées). Nouveau type d'intervention rappel_loyer.

userStories.title: Migration DB: type rappel_loyer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a dedicated rappel_loyer intervention type in the bail category so that payment reminders are properly categorized.
acceptanceCriteria: New migration adds rappel_loyer to intervention_types (category bail)
Icon: Banknote, Color: bg-emerald-600, Sort order: 10

userStories.title: Rent reminder card UI in LeaseInterventionsStep
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a 'Rappels de paiement' section with a single card showing a checkbox, day-of-month selector, and count of reminders so that I can enable monthly rent reminders.
acceptanceCriteria: New section 'Rappels de paiement' rendered between custom and standard sections
Card with Checkbox + Banknote icon + title 'Rappel de paiement du loyer'
Description shows computed count: 'X rappels mensuels seront créés'
Props: rentReminderEnabled, rentReminderDay, onRentReminderChange from parent

userStories.title: Parent state + submit expansion
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want my payment reminders to be created as actual interventions when the lease is submitted so that they appear in my intervention list.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit handler generates N monthly interventions from max(startDate, today) to endDate
Each intervention: title='Rappel loyer — {Month YYYY}', type=rappel_loyer
Created via existing createInterventionAction batch pattern
